description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features a prominent black shield emblem with a stylized letter 'J' inside, giving it a personalized or branded appearance. The surface of the cup is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of glazed ceramics. The handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping, and the cup's rim is gently curved for comfortable drinking. There is no visible lid, and the interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids. The cup is of standard size, similar to those commonly found in urban kitchens, cafes, or office break rooms.
description: A white ceramic cup with a black shield emblem and a single handle, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a gently curved rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black shield emblem with a 'J' and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the handle centered and no visible emblem or text.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and the emblem not visible; mirrored text appears in the background.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle not visible and the edge of the emblem just peeking into view.
